title: Old Docker reference audit

findings.subject: Old/reference LLM stack
findings.recommended_action: Mine configs/model routing read-only before porting; do not touch old Docker.

findings.subject: Automation stack
findings.recommended_action: Export n8n/Coder/OpenHands inventories before deciding revive/archive.

findings.subject: Data stack
findings.recommended_action: Inventory DB names/sizes with read-only DB credentials; verify client-active status.

findings.subject: Ghost services
findings.finding: 49 containers lack both repo and domain links.

recommended_action: Treat old Docker as reference; extract configs/data maps only.
